newsItems.title: 3 Market-Beating Stocks to Target This Week
newsItems.summary: Stocks that outperform the market usually share key traits such as rising sales, expanding margins, and increasing returns on capital. The select few that can do all three for many years are often the ones that make you life-changing money.
